title: Salsa Verde Chicken (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Salsa Verde Chicken is a tangy, flavorful high-protein meal that is easy to prepare and easy to log. With chicken, salsa verde, garlic, and spices, it delivers protein without heavy calories.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken
- Salsa verde
- Onion
- Garlic
- Broth or water
- Spices
- Optional lime
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Saute onion and garlic until fragrant.
2. Add chicken and seasonings, then cook until the chicken starts to brown.
3. Pour in salsa verde and a splash of broth or water.
4. Simmer until chicken is cooked and flavors meld.
5. Finish with lime if desired; serve and log your portion in Eati.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 211 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 5.5g
Protein: 32g

Tip: keep salsa verde servings steady for consistent macros.

conclusion: Tangy salsa verde keeps the meal exciting while staying macro-friendly. Track it in Eati to match your target.
metaDescription: Salsa Verde Chicken recipe with estimated calories, fat, and protein. Includes ingredients, instructions, and Eati logging tips.
